title: end of evangelion Shigeru Aoba
wikitext:
[]: end of evangelion Shigeru Aoba             Quote Post by zlink64 » Sat Jul 18, 2009 12:10 am does anyone know why he freaks out during instrumetallity during the end of evangelion. why doesn't Rei lure him like she did with every one else. just want to know if there's a specific reason to this.

[]:             Quote Post by Fast Tony DeNiro » Sat Jul 18, 2009 12:13 am In order to get everyone to lower their AT Field, Rei/Lilith takes the form of whoever they desire most. Hyuga sees Misato, Maya sees Ritsuko, Gendo sees Yui....since Aoba saw nothing except terrifying Rei's, I'm led to believe he didn't truly care for anyone.

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Sat Jul 18, 2009 12:14 am http://www.asexuality.org/home/

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Sat Jul 18, 2009 8:21 am Fast Tony DeNiro wrote: ....since Aoba saw nothing except terrifying Rei's, I'm led to believe he didn't truly care for anyone.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Jul 18, 2009 8:43 am I suspect he made inappropriate use of the dummy plug room to go bobbing for Reis... but being a sarcastic, cynical bastard with no strong feelings for anyone but himself works too.

[]:             Quote Post by TheLobe » Mon Jul 20, 2009 3:51 am Is it just me or do the bridge bunnies represent the 3 corners of sexuality.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Jul 20, 2009 7:13 am Can you elaborate?

[]:             Quote Post by TheLobe » Mon Jul 20, 2009 7:17 am one being asexual (aoba)one being heterosexual(hyuga) and another homosexual(maya). but I never understoood why the Rei's didn't turn into guitars.

[]:             Quote Post by Barong » Mon Jul 20, 2009 8:06 am ... or Aoba himself, actually.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jul 20, 2009 12:11 pm Supposedly Aoba is Nihilist which has to do with why he saw the Rei guides for what they really were. Still not sure where that claim is from, but it's something.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Mon Jul 20, 2009 12:13 pm ^ I've heard that too. He does give off that impression anyways.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jul 20, 2009 2:40 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Supposedly Aoba is Nihilist

[]:             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Tue Jul 21, 2009 6:35 pm Barong wrote: ... or Aoba himself, actually.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Jul 21, 2009 6:41 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Aoba is Nihilist

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Tue Jul 21, 2009 9:17 pm DEMOLITION D+ wrote: Barong wrote: ... or Aoba himself, actually.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Jul 21, 2009 9:44 pm I would have died if he turned into himself and was like "Yo" "Yo" then exploded.

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Tue Jul 21, 2009 10:16 pm I would have laughed if he saw Gendo or Kaji. The secret love that's never known....

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Wed Jul 22, 2009 5:00 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: I would have died if he turned into himself and was like "Yo" "Yo" then exploded.

[]:             Quote Post by NickFury90 » Wed Jul 22, 2009 7:41 pm I was hoping Rei turn into Gay Plot Device, just for the hell of it.

[]:             Quote Post by mrkitano » Fri Jul 24, 2009 4:08 am Don't know why but I settled for the fact that he wants all the attention from the ladies, but he doesn't know what to do when said ladies actually turn to him... looks like he's got a panic attack due to either agoraphobia or social anxiety. I think that we see Rei's instead of a lot of women (or even men too, dunno) simply because he himself didn't look. He was the only one who didn't. Instead, Rei got arse.
